schema.description: A comprehensive travel booking system that handles user authentication, flight search and booking, payment processing, travel insurance, budget management, and customer support for airline reservations.

tools.name: authenticate
tools.description: Authenticate user with the travel booking API and obtain an access token required for subsequent operations.

client_id.description: The client application ID supplied by App Management for API access.

client_secret.description: The client application secret supplied by App Management for secure authentication.

grant_type.description: The grant type of the authentication request specifying the level of access permissions.

first_name.description: The first name of the user to be authenticated.

last_name.description: The last name of the user to be authenticated.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired. Used in Authorization header for subsequent API calls.

token_type.description: The type of token issued, typically 'Bearer' for OAuth 2.0 authentication.

expires_in.description: The number of seconds until the access token expires and requires renewal.

scope.description: The granted scope indicating the permissions associated with this access token.

tools.name: check_login_status
tools.description: Check if the user is currently logged in and their access token is valid.

is_logged_in.description: Indicates whether the user is currently authenticated with a valid access token.

tools.name: list_airports
tools.description: List all available airports with their IATA codes for flight search and booking.

airport_codes.description: A list of airport codes in IATA format (3-letter codes such as 'SFO', 'LAX', 'JFK') representing all available airports in the system.

tools.name: get_airport_by_city
tools.description: Get the nearest airport IATA code for a given city name to facilitate flight searches.

city_name.description: The name of the city for which to find the nearest airport.

airport_code.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the nearest airport to the specified city.

city_name.description: The name of the city that was queried, returned for confirmation.

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search for available flights between two airports on a specific date with optional filtering by travel class.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. Can be obtained from list_airports or get_airport_by_city.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. Can be obtained from list_airports or get_airport_by_city.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., '2024-12-25').

travel_class.description: Optional filter by travel class. If not provided, returns all available classes.

max_results.description: Optional maximum number of flight options to return. Defaults to 5 if not specified.

flight_id.description: The unique identifier for this flight option.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport.

departure_time.description: The scheduled departure time for this flight.

arrival_time.description: The scheduled arrival time for this flight.

travel_class.description: The class of travel for this flight option (economy, business, or first).

cost.description: The price of this flight option in USD.

available_seats.description: The number of seats currently available for booking on this flight.

flights.description: A list of available flight options matching the search criteria.

tools.name: register_credit_card
tools.description: Register a credit card for payment in the travel booking system to enable flight bookings and insurance purchases.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

card_number.description: The credit card number, typically 13-19 digits.

expiration_date.description: The expiration date in format MM/YYYY (e.g., '12/2025').

cardholder_name.description: The name of the cardholder as it appears on the credit card.

cvv.description: The card verification number, typically 3-4 digits on the back of the card.

card_id.description: The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards. Used for payment operations.

card_number.description: The last 4 digits of the registered credit card for confirmation purposes.

registration_status.description: Indicates the success status of the credit card registration.

tools.name: get_credit_card_balance
tools.description: Get the current balance of a registered credit card to verify available funds before booking.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

card_id.description: The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards.
The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards.

balance.description: The current available balance on the credit card in USD.

currency.description: The currency code for the balance, typically 'USD'.

tools.name: list_credit_cards
tools.description: List all registered credit cards for the authenticated user to select a payment method.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

card_id.description: The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards.

card_number.description: The last 4 digits of the credit card for identification.

cardholder_name.description: The name of the cardholder as it appears on the credit card.

expiration_date.description: The expiration date in format MM/YYYY.

balance.description: The current available balance on the credit card in USD.

credit_cards.description: A list of all credit cards registered to the authenticated user's account.

tools.name: book_flight
tools.description: Book a flight using a registered credit card. Requires valid authentication and sufficient card balance.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

card_id.description: The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. Can be obtained from list_airports or get_airport_by_city.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. Can be obtained from list_airports or get_airport_by_city.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., '2024-12-25').

travel_class.description: The class of travel for the booking.

traveler_first_name.description: Optional first name of the traveler. If not provided, uses the authenticated user's first name.

traveler_last_name.description: Optional last name of the traveler. If not provided, uses the authenticated user's last name.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight. Used to reference this specific flight reservation.

transaction_id.description: The payment transaction ID for this booking.

booking_status.description: Indicates whether the flight booking was successfully completed.

cost.description: The total amount charged for this booking in USD.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in format YYYY-MM-DD.

travel_class.description: The class of travel for this booking.

tools.name: get_booking_invoice
tools.description: Retrieve the invoice details for a specific booking including payment and travel information.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight.
The booking ID obtained from book_flight.

invoice_number.description: The unique invoice number for this booking transaction.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in format YYYY-MM-DD.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport.

travel_class.description: The class of travel for this booking.

cost.description: The total amount charged for this booking in USD.

transaction_id.description: The payment transaction ID for this booking.

booking_date.description: The date when this booking was created.

payment_status.description: The current payment status for this booking.

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel an existing flight booking. Refund will be processed to the original payment method.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight or get_booking_invoice.

cancellation_status.description: Indicates whether the booking cancellation was successfully processed.

refund_amount.description: The amount refunded to the original payment method in USD.

refund_transaction_id.description: Optional refund transaction ID if the refund was processed.

cancellation_date.description: The date when the cancellation was processed.

tools.name: list_bookings
tools.description: List all bookings for the authenticated user with optional filtering by date range and status.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

start_date.description: Optional filter to show bookings from this date onwards in format YYYY-MM-DD. If not provided, shows all bookings.

end_date.description: Optional filter to show bookings up to this date in format YYYY-MM-DD. If not provided, shows all bookings.

status.description: Optional filter by booking status. If not provided, returns all statuses.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight.

travel_date.description: The date of travel in format YYYY-MM-DD.

departure_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport.

arrival_airport.description: The 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport.

travel_class.description: The class of travel for this booking.

cost.description: The total amount charged for this booking in USD.

booking_status.description: The current status of this booking (confirmed, cancelled, or pending).

booking_date.description: The date when this booking was created.

bookings.description: A list of all bookings matching the filter criteria for the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_insurance_quote
tools.description: Get a price quote for travel insurance before purchasing. This allows users to check the cost and coverage details before making a purchase decision.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight. The booking must be confirmed.

insurance_type.description: The type of insurance to get a quote for, determining the level of coverage.
The type of insurance quoted (basic, premium, or comprehensive).

insurance_cost.description: The estimated cost of the insurance in USD.

coverage_details.description: Details of what is covered under this insurance type, including benefits and limitations.

tools.name: purchase_insurance
tools.description: Purchase travel insurance for an existing booking. Users should call get_insurance_quote first to check the price before purchasing.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

booking_id.description: The booking ID obtained from book_flight. The booking must be confirmed.

insurance_type.description: The type of insurance to purchase, determining the level of coverage.

card_id.description: The credit card ID obtained from register_credit_card or list_credit_cards to use for payment.

insurance_id.description: The unique identifier for the purchased insurance policy.

insurance_status.description: Indicates whether the insurance purchase was successfully completed.

insurance_cost.description: The amount charged for the insurance in USD.

coverage_details.description: Details of what is covered under this insurance policy, including benefits and limitations.

tools.name: set_budget_limit
tools.description: Set a budget limit for travel expenses. Bookings exceeding this limit will be restricted.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

budget_limit.description: The budget limit to set in USD. Must be a positive number.
The budget limit that has been set for travel expenses in USD.

currency.description: The currency code for the budget limit, typically 'USD'.

status.description: Indicates the success status of setting the budget limit.

tools.name: get_budget_info
tools.description: Get the current budget limit and spending information for the authenticated user.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

budget_limit.description: Optional current budget limit for travel expenses in USD if one has been set.

total_spent.description: The total amount spent on travel bookings in USD.

remaining_budget.description: Optional remaining budget available for spending in USD if a limit has been set.

currency.description: The currency code for all budget amounts, typically 'USD'.

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using current exchange rates for international travel planning.

amount.description: The amount to convert. Must be a positive number.

from_currency.description: The source currency code to convert from.

to_currency.description: The target currency code to convert to.

converted_amount.description: The converted value in the target currency.

from_currency.description: The source currency code that was converted from.

to_currency.description: The target currency code that was converted to.

exchange_rate.description: The exchange rate used for the conversion calculation.

conversion_date.description: The date when the exchange rate was obtained for this conversion.

tools.name: contact_support
tools.description: Contact customer support for assistance with bookings or general inquiries about the travel booking system.

access_token.description: The access token obtained from authenticate. Must be valid and not expired.

booking_id.description: Optional booking ID obtained from book_flight or list_bookings if the inquiry is related to a specific booking.

subject.description: Optional subject line for the inquiry. If not provided, a default subject will be used.

message.description: The message content describing the issue or question for customer support.

support_ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the created support ticket.

status.description: Indicates that the support ticket was successfully created.

estimated_response_time.description: Optional expected time frame for receiving a response from customer support.

message.description: Confirmation message acknowledging the support ticket creation.

scenarios.description: Basic scenario with one authenticated user, one flight route, and one credit card - tests fundamental booking flow
Multiple users with existing bookings, various flight routes with different classes, and active support tickets - tests concurrent user management
Rich scenario with multiple users, diverse international routes, various booking statuses, insurance policies, and support tickets - tests full system capabilities

support_tickets.description: Need to cancel booking due to emergency
What is the baggage allowance for my flight?

scenarios.description: Edge cases: empty collections, expired token, zero balance card, invalid airport codes - tests error handling and validation

test_cases.error: No flights available for this route

input.message: I need help with my booking
input.subject: Booking Assistance

state_changes.authenticated_users: Added new user (Jane Doe) with access token
state_changes.credit_cards: Added new card (ff7973d1-1045-4f03-850d-27d60db603d0), updated card_001 balance from 5000.0 to 4737.5
state_changes.budget_limits: Added budget limit for new user (2000.0)
state_changes.total_spent: Added spending record for new user (250.0)

errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Successful insurance purchase with policy details. Actual: KeyError exception with message 'insurance_cost'
errors.root_cause: The purchase_insurance function is attempting to access a key 'insurance_cost' that doesn't exist in the insurance quote data structure. The get_insurance_quote returns a different schema than what purchase_insurance expects. The quote has 'insurance_type', 'insurance_cost', and 'coverage_details', but when stored in insurance_quotes, it may have a different structure (e.g., 'type', 'coverage', 'premium' fields). This indicates a schema mismatch between the quote generation and the purchase process.

test_cases.description: Check if user is logged in after authentication
Search flights with travel_class and max_results filters
Search flights with invalid route - returns empty list
List all credit cards for authenticated user
Get balance for registered credit card
Valid flight booking with all parameters
Get insurance quote for existing booking
Attempt to purchase insurance without quote
test_cases.error: No quote available for this insurance type
test_cases.note: Expected behavior - insurance requires quote first

test_cases.description: Attempt to set negative budget limit - validation error
test_cases.error: Budget limit must be a positive number

test_cases.description: Get budget information for authenticated user
Attempt to convert negative amount - validation error
test_cases.error: Amount must be a positive number

input.subject: Booking assistance

errors.error_details: Pydantic validation failed with 11 errors: exchange_rates.USD, exchange_rates.RMB, exchange_rates.EUR, exchange_rates.JPY, exchange_rates.GBP, exchange_rates.CAD, exchange_rates.AUD, exchange_rates.INR, exchange_rates.RUB, exchange_rates.BRL, exchange_rates.MXN all expect 'valid dictionary or instance of ExchangeRate' but received float input_type
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Validation error on invalid data. Actual: Validation error occurred as expected - exchange_rates should be ExchangeRate model instances/dicts, not simple floats
errors.root_cause: The scenario intentionally contains invalid exchange_rates data (simple float values instead of ExchangeRate objects) to test boundary validation. The load_scenario tool correctly validates the schema and rejects malformed data.

load_scenario.error: 11 validation errors for TravelBookingScenario - exchange_rates fields (USD, RMB, EUR, JPY, GBP, CAD, AUD, INR, RUB, BRL, MXN) expect dictionary/ExchangeRate instances but received float values

tool_executions.tool_name: N/A - Skipped due to expected load_scenario failure

save_scenario.error: Skipped due to load_scenario failure (expected behavior)

errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Successful insurance purchase with policy details. Actual: KeyError exception with message 'insurance_cost'
errors.root_cause: The purchase_insurance function is attempting to access a key 'insurance_cost' that doesn't exist in the insurance quote data structure. The get_insurance_quote returns a different schema than what purchase_insurance expects. The quote has 'insurance_type', 'insurance_cost', and 'coverage_details', but when stored in insurance_quotes, it may have a different structure (e.g., 'type', 'coverage', 'premium' fields). This indicates a schema mismatch between the quote generation and the purchase process.

error.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Successful insurance purchase with policy details. Actual: KeyError exception with message 'insurance_cost'
error.root_cause: The purchase_insurance function is attempting to access a key 'insurance_cost' that doesn't exist in the insurance quote data structure. The get_insurance_quote returns a different schema than what purchase_insurance expects. The quote has 'insurance_type', 'insurance_cost', and 'coverage_details', but when stored in insurance_quotes, it may have a different structure (e.g., 'type', 'coverage', 'premium' fields). This indicates a schema mismatch between the quote generation and the purchase process.

high_tool_logic_errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Successful insurance purchase with policy details. Actual: KeyError exception with message 'insurance_cost'
high_tool_logic_errors.root_cause: The purchase_insurance function is attempting to access a key 'insurance_cost' that doesn't exist in the insurance quote data structure. The get_insurance_quote returns a different schema than what purchase_insurance expects. The quote has 'insurance_type', 'insurance_cost', and 'coverage_details', but when stored in insurance_quotes, it may have a different structure (e.g., 'type', 'coverage', 'premium' fields). This indicates a schema mismatch between the quote generation and the purchase process.
